title: 7 Herbal Teas for Runners with Burning Feet
description: Equisetum arvense teas, also known as horsetail tea, may help with burning feet due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The tea contains silica, flavonoids, and alkaloids that can help soothe and protect the skin. Silica, in particular, can help to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, which may ease burning sensations in the feet.
